---
name: New BOM / product entry
about: Submit a missing part, BOM row, or a brand new product folder request
title: "[BOM] "
labels: bom
---

**Product**
Which product is this for? (existing folder name, or a new one you're proposing)

**Part(s)**
What part(s) should be added/corrected?

**Source / equivalent**
Link to the OEM/AliExpress equivalent, if known.

**How did you verify this?**
Own purchase, measured original part, seller confirmation, etc.
